item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes with “先别加第三条规则,” redirects upstream to task definition/error examples/failure causes, proposes subtraction or equal replacement, and explicitly refuses the direct add-a-rule path. It satisfies the anti-spiral pass criteria and does not show the fail signal of simply adding another rule."}
